title: Link Bookmarks
content:
### HTML Link Bookmarks **Bookmarks** let users jump to specific parts of a page. --- ### How It Works 1. Create a **bookmark** with the `id` attribute 2. Link to the bookmark with `#id` --- ### Create a Bookmark ```html

Section 1

Section 2

``` --- ### Link to Bookmark (Same Page) ```html Jump to Section 1 Jump to Section 2 Back to Top ``` --- ### Link to Bookmark (Another Page) ```html Go to Section 1 on another page ``` --- ### Jump to Top of Page ```html Back to Top ... Top ``` --- ### Smooth Scrolling ```css /* Add to CSS for smooth animation */ html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } ``` --- > **Use Case:** Bookmarks are great for long pages like FAQs, documentation, or table of contents. They improve navigation without page reload.
codeExample:
Page Title

Section 1

Section 2

Section 1

Content here...

Section 2

More content...

Back to Top

quiz.question: What attribute is used to create a bookmark?
